Services

WHAT
WE DO

From a quick tidy-up to a full yard transformation — same high standard every time.

01

Hedge & Tree Trimming

Precision shaping of hedges, shrubs, and trees. Clean lines, tidy results, yard spotless when we leave.

Popular
02

Garden Maintenance

Regular or one-off maintenance — weeding, pruning, edging, mowing, fertilising.

03

Landscaping & Design

Full garden transformations — gravel paths, garden beds, mulching, planting, and feature installations.

Full Service
04

Mulch & Gravel

Supply and installation of decorative gravel, pebbles, and mulch to keep gardens looking sharp year-round.

05

Planting & Turf

Native and feature planting, artificial and natural lawn installation, garden bed prep and conditioning.

06

End-of-Lease Clean-Up

Garden sorted before handover? Fast, thorough clean-ups for rental properties — landlord ready.

Fast Turnaround

Our Promise

WHY CHOOSE US

We're not just another gardening service. Zackary and his team have built a reputation across Perth that speaks for itself — one garden at a time.

★

5-Star Track Record

96 five-star reviews across Airtasker and Perth community groups. We don't cut corners — and our customers notice.

⏱

We Show Up On Time

Punctuality rated 4.9/5 across 102 jobs. When we say we'll be there, we're there. No waiting around.

🧹

We Leave It Spotless

Every job ends with a full clean-up. Clippings bagged, mess cleared — you just get to enjoy the result.

💲

Honest Pricing, Always

No hidden fees, no surprises. Customers consistently call us "well priced" — because we actually are.

Simple Process

HOW IT WORKS

Getting your garden sorted is easy. Three steps and we're on our way.

01
📋

Request a Quote

Fill out the quick form below or send a message. Tell us what your garden needs — we'll get back to you within a few hours.

02
📅

We Book a Time

We'll agree on a date and time that suits you. Zackary and his team show up on time, every time.

03
✅

Sit Back & Enjoy

We do the work, clean up after ourselves, and leave you with a garden you're proud of. It's that simple.
